title: Administration and Human Resources Department
html:
Administration and Human Resources Department

Overview

Administration & Human Resources department forms part of the strategic leadership of the Agency. It provides direction for the development and implementation of administrative & human resource systems that will aid the efficient operations of the Agency.

Admin & HR contributes to the success of the Agency by coordinating and supervising daily Admin & H.R functions and streamlining management systems for the smooth operations of daily and operationalization of the Agency.  Its responsible is also not limited to develop, maintain, implement, and ensure compliance with administrative management, provisions of the Agency’s rules, policies, and procedures.

Key Tasks

  • Human Resources development and management
  • Fleet  management
  • Property and facilities management.
  • Stores and logistics management

Specialised Units

  • Procurement
  • Admin/Human Resources
  • Logistics Management

Head of Department 

Mr. Alpha Swaray,
Director of the Department of Administration and Human Resources
